name: An Average Night at the Pop Palace
description:
You've been working in the Pop Palace for a while. Wearing a sexy Playboy bunny outfit, complete with white cottontails and bunny ears. The job is helping patrons with inflation devices, helping them pop, and cleaning up their scraps.

-

The Bar - At the bar there is a drink at the bar called a Poptail. When someone drinks it, they will start to inflate until they pop. But beware, it’s super contagious.

The Photo Booth - This booth can transform people into sex dolls.

Helium Balloon Booth - Where someone can inflate into giant balloons that float along the ceiling.

[inflation, transformation, sex doll tf, popping, expansion]

Art by Sanone

This is based on the story by pop-palace called: An Average Night at the Pop Palace
creator: bobibone
